title: Legacy Edition Remake
description: First modpack made to recreate LCE, dating back to 2021. Archival purposes only!
body:
# Legacy Edition Remake
**The first LCE to Java recreation, circa 2021**
![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4d826c9a4e8692acc8020c6db71cb0a260ae314.png)

This modpack originates from September or October of 2021, and was the first in a now expanded effort to re-create Legacy Console Edition in Java Edition.

It utilizes (very jank) fancy-menu to achieve this, with a few performance mods thrown in. It is functional, and this is simply for a public archive of history!

![World Creation Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48f659f25af8cb1fe556f61cfc5289fa02def2b6.png)

### What it contains
- *some* LCE-styled menus
- Performance mods
- Shader support
